results.title: Nearly 800 Gather for the 23rd Annual Latinas in Leadership Symposium; Civil Rights Icon Dolores Huerta Defines Leadership as "People Who Do the Work"
results.description: HARTFORD, Conn., June 4, 2026 /PRNewswire/ --Nearly 800 professionals, entrepreneurs, community advocates, students, and allies gathered for the 23rd Annual Latinas in Leadership Symposium, themed "Atrévete...Because Representation Matters," a powerful celebration of leadership, resilience,...
